response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and detected two distinct songs: 'Daisuke' and 'Carbonated Love'. 2. Identified 'Daisuke' as a cover of an UPLIFT SPICE song and 'Carbonated Love' as an original IRyS song via on-screen metadata. 3. Used search tool to confirm artist and song metadata. 4. Transcribed lyrics directly from the video which fully displayed them. 5. Mapped scenes to timestamps.
response.global_summary: A video featuring IRyS performing two songs: 'Daisuke' (originally by UPLIFT SPICE) and her original song 'Carbonated Love', in a racing-themed environment with 3D models.

scenes.description: IRyS performs the song 'Daisuke', originally by UPLIFT SPICE, while dancing in a racing-themed stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Please tell me now
How do you feel me?
Please show me now
I wanna dance with you more
Right now, I want you one for you
Everytime, everywhere, I will surely get your honest love
Daisuke...
I'm a natural girl, but you're a prince for me
I'm a country girl, but you're a super city boy
Everytime, wondering how I become your girl
Every night, I'm feeling your body in my dreams
I can't sleep at all
Hello morning sun
My love, my crush, wanna tell you my feeling
Please tell me now
How do you feel me?
Please show me now
I wanna dance with you more
Right now, I want you one for you
Everytime, everywhere, I will surely get your honest love
Daisuke...

scenes.description: IRyS performs her original song 'Carbonated Love' in a racing car and on a stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Lost in love, I thought I'd never understand
Couldn't help it when you took my hand
Roads I IGNORED Before
You left me WANTING MORE
Destroyed everything just to get a bit ahead
Neon LIGHTS fly by, is it FAKE or REALITY?
Not sure of much but know I'm ready
Soaring these STREETS Make me COMPLETE
Full throttle, COME GIVE ME YOUR ALL
Engine's not Keeping up With the BEAT of my heart
Just CAN'T Get Enough
REVVING UP, MAKE IT FAST
ONLY US, MAKE IT LAST
TILL THE SUN'S UP
'Nother shot in the dark, TAKE ME AWAY
Fizzing up in my HEART, It's all ok
ACCELERATE ME UNTIL I'M THERE
YOU AND I
Reach the line, MARK The END
But WE'LL
Keep on goin' until the bubbles fade
I don't CARE if i don't see another day
SHOCKING IN MY HEART
GIVE Me ALL that you Got
Windows down, DON'T HESITATE A MINUTE MORE
TIME IS UP, NOT ENOUGH
FILL IT UP AND DON'T LOOK BACK AGAIN
Carbonated Love
